# SOURCE-GL: Gym Launch (Complete Program)

> **Pessoa:** Alex Hormozi (+ Leila Hormozi, Alex Charfen, Mimi COO)
> **Programa:** Gym Launch — Complete Training System
> **Módulos:** 5 (GL 2.0, Quick Launch, Hybrid, In-GYM Launch, Resources)
> **Arquivos:** 1,390 total (1,121 strategic processed)
> **Tamanho:** ~10.3 MB
> **Elementos extraídos:** 565 (after dedup)
> **Data extração:** 2026-03-19
> **Versão:** v1.0.0

---

## Módulos

| Módulo | Arquivos | Tamanho | Conteúdo Principal |
|--------|----------|---------|-------------------|
| 01-Gym Launch 2.0 | 125 | 48KB | Core program: Lead Gen, Sales, Fulfillment fundamentals |
| 02-Quick Launch | 51 | 367KB | Condensed launch system: Ads live in 48hrs |
| 03-Hybrid | 442 | 3.5MB | **Largest module**: Advanced Sales (183 files), Lead Gen, Fulfillment |
| 04-In-GYM Launch | 368 | 2.5MB | In-gym variant + unique Retention section (17 files) |
| 05-Resources | 404 | 3.4MB | Owner Training (108), Presentations (44), BI Metrics, Playbook (121) |

## Key Named Frameworks

### Sales
1. **C-L-O-S-E-R Framework** — Master sales framework (Clarify→Label→Overview→Sell→Explain→Reinforce)
2. **Three-Pillar Pitch** — Fitness/Nutrition/Accountability diagnostic
3. **Pain Cycle Questioning Loop** — Amplify past failures to create urgency
4. **Diagnostic Sale** — Universal 2-page script, consolidated 5 selling systems into one
5. **Obstacle Overcome System** — 4 categories (Stall/Spouse/Money/Fitness-specific)
6. **No-Sale Sale** — Revenue recovery from rejected prospects via supplements
7. **Abandoned Hope Sale** — Halfway resell at 70-80% close rate
8. **Green Play** — Assumed close with either/or options, 90%+ close rate
9. **Money Objection Stack** — 9-step escalation for price resistance
10. **Pre-Sell Environment** — 7-step physical setup that closes before you talk

### Lead Generation
11. **Lead Gen Scrambler** — 5-variable ad variation matrix
12. **Funnel Algebra (EPC Model)** — Revenue = Impressions × CTR × Opt-in × Close × Ticket
13. **Messenger Setter Script** — 8-step organic outreach
14. **Ad Optimization Decision Tree** — Morning losers / Evening winners
15. **Retargeting Architecture** — Content video → 75% viewers → DR ad at $5/day
16. **Hybrid Bolt-On** — Internal upsell to existing members at 50% close rate
17. **Facebook Compliance Framework** — How not to get banned

### Fulfillment
18. **Four Pillars of Fulfillment** — Fitness/Nutrition/Supplementation/Accountability
19. **5-Day Lead Nurture Sequence** — Contact cadence with double-dial
20. **Supplement A-B Close** — 90-day bundle → Ultimate subscription → Crossout downsell
21. **Reminder Sequence** — Night before + Morning of + 1 hour before
22. **24-Week Nutrition Progression** — Food list → Hand portions → Scale → Calories → Macros
23. **MWF/TTS Communication Cadence** — Fitness/Nutrition/Mood themed daily check-ins
24. **Keep 'Em Hot Campaign** — 12-step post-sale text sequence
25. **Challenge Playbook Architecture** — 6-Week + 42-Day Detox + 28-Day + 12-Week HTP + Reactivation

### Operations & Leadership
26. **Emotional Intelligence Framework** — 5 components with daily practice
27. **Communication Cycle Architecture** — Daily huddle → Weekly → Monthly → Quarterly
28. **Hiring Pipeline** — 9-step from recruiting to onboarding
29. **4R Job Description** — Roles/Responsibilities/Requirements/Results
30. **Delegation Levels** — L1 (tell) → L5 (decide+act)
31. **Staffing Classes** — A(0-100) → B(100-200) → C(200-350) → D(350+)
32. **Firing Protocol** — Documentation → timing → execution → team communication
33. **Retention System** — Tracking + Reach Outs + Attendance + Cards + Events + Exit Interviews
34. **Profit Multiplication** — Raise EFT + Raise prices + Bolt-ons + Optimize delivery + Reduce churn
35. **Weaponized Community** — Identity + Shared enemy + Rituals + Origin story + Insider language
36. **ROI on Life** — Consistency + Abundance + Responsibility + Attention + Relationships + Values
37. **Dual Marketing Calendar** — External (cold traffic) + Internal (existing clients, zero CAC)
38. **Accountability Paradox** — More accountability → more freedom
39. **COO Operating Framework** — Protect entrepreneur + eliminate distractions + communicate vision
40. **Tolerance Audit** — List tolerations → rate impact → address highest first

---

## Numerical Benchmarks (Gold)

| Metric | Value | Context |
|--------|-------|---------|
| Scheduling rate | 60% avg → 90%+ elite | Pipeline benchmark |
| Show rate | 50% avg → 80% elite | Pipeline benchmark |
| Close rate (in-person) | 50% → 80% elite | Pipeline benchmark |
| Total conversion | 10% avg → 25%+ phenomenal | Leads to close |
| CPL target | $8-13 good, <$25 great | Facebook ads |
| 72-hour rule | Never judge ad before 72hrs | Ad testing |
| Ad testing volume | 300 ads per $50K campaign | Creative testing |
| Min ad spend | $100/day across 6-10 ad sets | Daily budget |
| ROI per call | $10 per call, 50 calls/hour | Lead nurture math |
| Supplement close rate | 90%+ with system | Assumed close |
| Coach capacity | 75 clients per coach | Fulfillment |
| Check-in time | 15 min biweekly per client | Coaching ops |
| Churn math | 7% churn = max 143 EFTs | Business capacity |
| EFT sweet spot | $150-200/month | Pricing |
| Abandoned Hope | 70-80% close rate | Halfway resell |
| Re-sign rate | 75% target | Trial to full |
| Back-out rate | <5% great | Post-sale |
| Refund rate | 0-2.5% elite | Program end |
| Satisfaction guarantee | 2 refunds in 4,000 sales | Risk reversal |
| Sales availability | 6 days/week, 3-8pm minimum | Scheduling impact |

---

## Observações

1. **Duplication across modules**: ~90% overlap between Hybrid (03) and In-GYM Launch (04). Quick Launch (02) is condensed subset. Elements deduplicated.
2. **Strongest unique content**: Owner Training (Leila), Retention section (In-GYM only), BI Metrics, Presentation Recordings (multiple speakers)
3. **269 files skipped**: Tool/setup tutorials (ClickFunnels, Zapier, Acuity, video editors) — operational not strategic
4. **31 tiny files** (<100 bytes): PDF cover stubs, no content
5. **This is AH's most comprehensive program** — covers entire business lifecycle from lead gen to retention to leadership
